heading: Rules to implement subchapter
label: 3614a Rules to implement subchapter
text: The Secretary may make rules (including rules for the collection, maintenance, and analysis of appropriate data) to carry out this subchapter. The Secretary shall give public notice and opportunity for comment with respect to all rules made under this section.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 816 and is classified to .section 815 of Pub. L. 90–284section 3615 of this title
